versions.description: Initial deployment — default z-score + 16 confluence strategies

performance.notes: Confluence strategies produced 0 signals. All trades from default_zscore fallback. Breakeven at 0.3R too aggressive — activates early, takes tiny partial, then price reverses to -commission.

versions.verdict: ❌ FAILING — breakeven mechanic bleeds on commissions

versions.description: Fix breakeven bleed: increase breakeven_at_rr from 0.3 to 1.0

performance.notes: Breakeven still leaks on small stops. Duplicate trades inflated trade count (real ~7-8 unique). exit_price showed candle close, not fill price — PnL and exit_price contradicted each other.

versions.verdict: ⚠️ PARTIAL — PnL positive but exit_price bug + duplicates

versions.description: Exit price accuracy, duplicate prevention, PnL from real prices

changes.reason: exit_price contradicted PnL — showed candle close instead of actual fill
PnL now derived from actual entry→exit prices
Same signal fired on consecutive bars, creating duplicate trades

changes.old: stop_pct * be_rr (could be as low as 0.1%)
changes.reason: Partial TP of 0.1% * 0.5 = 0.05% couldn't cover 0.11% commission

changes.new: stored + used for weighted average exit_price
changes.reason: Transparency: Telegram now shows partial TP price

performance.notes: Fresh deploy — stats reset. Awaiting results.
